response: This function tokenizes a mathematical expression by scanning left-to-right and converting it into a list of `(type, value)` pairs. It uses a simple manual finite-state/character-walking pattern to group consecutive digits (and `.`) into a `NUM` token, skips whitespace, and emits single-character operator/parenthesis `OP` tokens for `+ - * / ( )`, raising an error on any unexpected character.
